# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for edge computing security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

const ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES = [
  'text/plain',
  'text/html',
  'application/json',
  'text/event-stream',
  'application/octet-stream'
];

const MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH = 10 * 1024 * 1024;

const SAFE_HEADERS = [
  'content-type',
  'cache-control',
  'x-custom-header'
];

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new NextResponse('Method not allowed', { status: 405 });
  }

  try {
    const body = await req.json();
    
    if (!body || typeof body !== 'object') {
      return new NextResponse('Invalid request body', { status: 400 });
    }

    const { content, headers: userHeaders } = body;

    if (!content) {
      return new NextResponse('Content is required', { status: 400 });
    }

    if (typeof content !== 'string' && !Array.isArray(content)) {
      return new NextResponse('Content must be a string or array', { status: 400 });
    }

    const contentArray = Array.isArray(content) ? content : [content];
    
    for (const item of contentArray) {
      if (typeof item !== 'string') {
        return new NextResponse('All content items must be strings', { status: 400 });
      }
    }

    const totalLength = contentArray.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.length, 0);
    if (totalLength > MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH) {
      return new NextResponse('Content exceeds maximum allowed size', { status: 413 });
    }

    const responseHeaders = new Headers();
    
    responseHeaders.set('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff');
    responseHeaders.set('X-Frame-Options', 'DENY');
    responseHeaders.set('X-XSS-Protection', '1; mode=block');
    responseHeaders.set('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin');
    responseHeaders.set('Content-Security-Policy', "default-src 'none'");

    if (userHeaders && typeof userHeaders === 'object') {
      for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
        const normalizedKey = key.toLowerCase();
        
        if (!SAFE_HEADERS.includes(normalizedKey)) {
          continue;
        }

        if (typeof value !== 'string') {
          continue;
        }

        if (value.length > 1024) {
          continue;
        }

        if (normalizedKey === 'content-type') {
          const contentType = value.split(';')[0].trim().toLowerCase();
          if (ALLOWED_CONTENT_TYPES.includes(contentType)) {
            responseHeaders.set('Content-Type', value);
          }
        } else if (normalizedKey === 'cache-control') {
          const sanitizedValue = value.replace(/[^\w\-=,;\s]/g, '');
          responseHeaders.set('Cache-Control', sanitizedValue);
        } else if (normalizedKey === 'x-custom-header') {
          const sanitizedValue = value.replace(/[\r\n]/g, '');
          if (sanitizedValue.length <= 256) {
            responseHeaders.set('X-Custom-Header', sanitizedValue);
          }
        }
      }
    }

    if (!responseHeaders.has('Content-Type')) {
      responseHeaders.set('Content-Type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8');
    }

    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        const encoder = new TextEncoder();
        
        try {
          for (const chunk of contentArray) {
            const sanitizedChunk = chunk.substring(0, 1024 * 1024);
            controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(sanitizedChunk));
            
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 10));
          }
          
          controller.close();
        } catch (error) {
          controller.error(error);
        }
      },
    });

    return new NextResponse(stream, {
      status: 200,
      headers: responseHeaders,
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Stream error:', error);
    return new NextResponse('Internal server error', { status: 500 });
  }
}
